current_run.description: Given an oracle f(x) such that f(x) = g(x XOR s) for some secret N-bit integer s, where g(y) is the parity of the sum of cyclic adjacent bit products of y. Specifically, g(y) = (y_0 y_1 + y_1 y_2 + ... + y_{N-2} y_{N-1} + y_{N-1} y_0) mod 2, where y_i is the i-th bit of y (LSB is y_0). The goal is to find the secret s.
